summary: Completed testing of Iteration 11 - Image Modal Bug Fixes. All features verified working correctly. Account Detail page image modal is VIEW-ONLY (no upload/delete buttons). Edit form has full upload functionality with 'Choose from Device' and 'Open Camera' buttons using getUserMedia API.
passed_tests: Backend: Account with images (69bed77d5b33dabe3fd5ef75) returns images array
Backend: Image upload endpoint requires authentication
Backend: Image delete endpoint requires authentication
Backend: Image upload works with proper auth
Backend: Image delete works with proper auth
Backend: File serve endpoint requires auth (query param or header)
Backend: All iteration 10 tests still pass (9 tests)
UI: Account Detail page image modal is VIEW-ONLY - no upload buttons
UI: Account Detail page image modal is VIEW-ONLY - no delete button
UI: Account Detail page image modal shows images with navigation (1/4)
UI: Account Detail page image modal shows thumbnails
UI: Edit form jewellery section has Images button with count (4/5)
UI: Edit form image modal has 'Choose from Device' button
UI: Edit form image modal has 'Open Camera' button
UI: Edit form image modal has delete button (red X on image)
UI: Edit form image modal shows '1 more image(s) can be added' text
UI: New Account form shows 'Images can be uploaded after saving the account.' note
UI: New Account form does NOT show Images button

detail_page_view_only_modal.details: Account Detail page image modal is VIEW-ONLY. No upload buttons (Choose from Device, Open Camera) and no delete button. Images display correctly with navigation arrows and thumbnails.

edit_form_upload_modal.details: Edit form image modal has full upload functionality: 'Choose from Device' button (data-testid='form-upload-device-btn'), 'Open Camera' button (data-testid='form-open-camera-btn'), and delete button (red X on image).

camera_getUserMedia.details: Camera functionality uses navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia() API with facingMode: 'environment' for rear camera. Cannot test actual camera in headless browser, but code implementation is correct.

new_form_no_images.details: New Account form does NOT show Images button. Shows note: 'Images can be uploaded after saving the account.'

critical_code_review_comments: AccountDetailPage.js image modal is now view-only (lines 552-606) - no upload/delete buttons
AccountFormPage.js has full upload functionality with getUserMedia camera (lines 248-295)
Camera implementation correctly uses navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia() with proper stream cleanup
seed_data_creation: Used existing accounts: 69bed77d5b33dabe3fd5ef75 (ACC000046 with 4 images), 69bed77c5b33dabe3fd5ef72 (ACC000045 with close/reopen history)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 11 bug fixes verified. Key changes: 1) AccountDetailPage image modal is now VIEW-ONLY (no upload/delete). 2) AccountFormPage edit form has full upload with camera using getUserMedia. Test accounts: 69bed77d5b33dabe3fd5ef75 (4 images), 69bed77c5b33dabe3fd5ef72 (history). Camera cannot be tested in headless browser but code is correct.
